title: Jumbo Santa Christmas Sack – Special Delivery Design – Extra Large 59cm x 49cm x 35cm Red Polypropylene Present Bag with Rustic Pull String Closure – Reusable Gift Sack for Kids & Grandkids
features: JUMBO CHRISTMAS SACK : Large red Santa sack measuring approx. H59cm x W49cm x D35cm, providing plenty of space for multiple wrapped presents, toys, or bulky festive items, perfect for use on Christmas Eve or Christmas morning

SANTA’S SPECIAL DELIVERY DESIGN : Features a bold “Santa’s Special Delivery” slogan with snowflakes and cheerful festive artwork, making it a fun and exciting way to present gifts for children, grandchildren, and the whole family

STRONG MATERIAL: Made from sturdy polypropylene fabric designed to be long-lasting and durable, ensuring that gifts remain neatly stored and protected while adding a festive touch under the Christmas tree

RUSTIC PULL STRING CORD : Fitted with a traditional drawstring closure, this sack can be quickly tightened to secure the contents, keeping presents safely inside while also giving it an authentic festive look

REUSABLE FESTIVE SACK : A practical and reusable storage solution that can be brought out year after year, helping families organise and transport presents with ease while adding to the excitement of the festive season
IDEAL FOR FAMILY GIFTING : Perfect for parents, grandparents, and relatives wanting to keep gifts together in one place, making Christmas morning more organised, magical, and memorable
description: Bring extra excitement to Christmas morning with this Jumbo Santa Christmas Sack , designed to keep presents neatly stored and beautifully presented. Measuring approximately 59cm high, 49cm wide, and 35cm deep , this oversized sack offers plenty of room for multiple wrapped gifts, toys, games, or bulky items, making it a practical choice for families with children or grandchildren. The sack is made from sturdy polypropylene material , chosen for its durability and strength, so it can safely hold heavy or awkwardly shaped presents without tearing. It’s finished with a rustic pull string cord closure that secures the contents while giving the sack a traditional festive appearance. Easy to open and close, it keeps everything together in one place ready to be revealed on Christmas morning. Decorated in bold red with a striking “Santa’s Special Delivery” design, complete with snowflakes and a cheerful Santa graphic, this sack captures the magic of Christmas. Place it under the tree on Christmas Eve or by the fireplace to surprise children with a bundle of gifts, ready to open the next day. This reusable festive sack is a reliable way to organise and carry presents year after year. Perfect for parents, grandparents, and relatives, it helps make Christmas more organised and memorable while adding a touch of traditional festive charm to your celebrations. Features: - Jumbo Santa Christmas Sack - Dimensions: H59cm x W49cm x D35cm - Red with “Santa’s Special Delivery” design - Sturdy polypropylene material - Rustic pull string cord closure - Designed for holding pre-wrapped gifts - Reusable year after year
